mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patch_security_result (host_id, mac_address, risk_score, risk_level, risk_count, critical_count, high_count, medium_count, low_count, ai_summary, analyzed_at) VALUES (#{hostId}, #{macAddress}, #{riskScore}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskCount}, #{criticalCount}, #{highCount}, #{mediumCount}, #{lowCount}, #{aiSummary}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE mac_address = VALUES(mac_address), risk_score = VALUES(risk_score), risk_level = VALUES(risk_level), risk_count = VALUES(risk_count), critical_count = VALUES(critical_count), high_count = VALUES(high_count), medium_count = VALUES(medium_count), low_count = VALUES(low_count), ai_summary = VALUES(ai_summary), analyzed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO patch_security_risk (result_id, host_id, risk_type, severity, title, description, evidence, recommendation, related_patches, related_cves) VALUES
(#{r.resultId}, #{r.hostId}, #{r.riskType}, #{r.severity}, #{r.title}, #{r.description}, #{r.evidence}, #{r.recommendation}, #{r.relatedPatches}, #{r.relatedCves})
mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, h.hostname, h.ip_address, h.os_name, h.os_version, h.status FROM patch_security_result r LEFT JOIN hosts h ON h.id = r.host_id AND h.deleted = 0 WHERE r.risk_count > 0
AND (h.hostname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.ip_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.risk_score DESC, r.analyzed_at DESC
SELECT r.*, h.hostname, h.ip_address, h.os_name, h.os_version, h.status FROM patch_security_result r LEFT JOIN hosts h ON h.id = r.host_id WHERE r.host_id = #{hostId}
SELECT * FROM patch_security_risk WHERE host_id = #{hostId} ORDER BY severity, id
SELECT DISTINCT h.id FROM hosts h INNER JOIN installed_patch ip ON ip.mac_address = h.mac_address WHERE h.deleted = 0

SELECT h.id AS host_id, h.hostname, h.ip_address, h.mac_address, h.os_name, h.os_version, h.status, COALESCE(r.risk_score, 0) AS risk_score, COALESCE(r.risk_level, 'low') AS risk_level, COALESCE(r.risk_count, 0) AS risk_count, COALESCE(r.critical_count, 0) AS critical_count, COALESCE(r.high_count, 0) AS high_count, COALESCE(r.medium_count, 0) AS medium_count, COALESCE(r.low_count, 0) AS low_count, r.ai_summary, r.analyzed_at FROM hosts h LEFT JOIN patch_security_result r ON r.host_id = h.id WHERE h.deleted = 0
AND (h.hostname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.ip_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.risk_score DESC, h.hostname ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE patch_security_result SET ai_summary = #{aiSummary}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE host_id = #{hostId}
